mapper.sql: id, product_id, product_version_id, base_rule_id, reviewer_id, override_min_fund_count, override_max_fund_count, override_max_single_weight, final_rule_json, decision_comment, created_at
mapper.select: select from app.advisor_product_rule_decision where product_version_id = #{productVersionId} order by id desc limit 1
